modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble connecting videoconference room equipment to Zoom and WebEx meetings.

full_description_text: 
So, the user is trying to connect their Cisco room stuff to Zoom. They mentioned the Crestron panel isn’t working right. Also, they wanna know how to join WebEx meetings in the conference room. It’s a bit confusing for them.
short_description: Trouble connecting videoconference room equipment to Zoom and WebEx meetings.
description: So, the user is trying to connect their Cisco room stuff to Zoom. They mentioned the Crestron panel isn’t working right. Also, they wanna know how to join WebEx meetings in the conference room. It’s a bit confusing for them.
